name: IMMUNODIAGNOSTIC S
summary: Immunodiagnostic Systems Holdings PLC (IDS) is a UK-based in-vitro diagnostics company that develops, manufactures, and markets clinical diagnostic solutions to the global healthcare market. The company focuses on providing specialist automated immunoanalyzers and assays to diagnose and monitor bone metabolism, vitamin status, and autoimmune diseases. IDS is headquartered in Boldon, Tyne and Wear, UK.
